title: Black Widow
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Black Widow''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] owned by [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Bruce Mercy]] which acted as a [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] for his band of pirates.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Treasure Hunt (adventure)|book=Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
